integrity.description: The agent used the Webots GUI to configure the simulation
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Webots application interface (Scene Tree, 3D view, Field Editor) being used, rather than a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) editing the .wbt file directly.

integrity.description: The agent actively navigated the Scene Tree to find the joints
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the hierarchical expansion of nodes in the Webots Scene Tree to locate the specific X, Y, and Z axis joints, JointParameters, and LinearMotors.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file from within Webots
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of clicking 'File -> Save World As...' in the Webots menu, rather than using terminal commands to copy or rename an existing file to bypass the GUI save process.
